subject: Invoice higher than expected after seat expansion
summary: Globex reported that the December invoice was higher than the contract amount after adding 35 seats in November.
cause: Monthly flexible seat true-up added prorated charges for seats activated mid-cycle.
resolution: Provided line-item explanation and exported seat-change audit for finance review.

subject: PO number missing from invoice PDF
summary: Northwind needed the purchase order number added to their invoice PDF.
cause: PO field was not populated before invoice generation.
resolution: Billing Ops regenerated the PDF with the correct PO number.
